
  typedef logic unpacked_uint32_t[31:0];
  typedef logic [31:0] packed_uint32_t;

  typedef logic unpacked_uint33_t[32:0];
  typedef logic [32:0] packed_uint33_t;

  typedef logic unpacked_uint64_t[63:0];
  typedef logic [63:0] packed_uint64_t;

  typedef logic unpacked_uint65_t[64:0];
  typedef logic [64:0] packed_uint65_t;
